response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided song 'Hana ni Bourei' by Yorushika, performed as a cover by the VTubers. I used the on-screen lyrics and the reference JSON to verify spelling and intent, noting that the performers sing specific variations of the chorus (e.g., 'summer is coming' vs 'goodbye') at different points. The transcription covers both the introductory conversation and the full musical performance, with timestamps tightly synced to the vocal audio and pauses handled via segmentation.

subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: まぁ、あんなに運がバラバラだしね～
subtitles.english: Well, everyone's luck was so scattered.

subtitles.original: でも全部は無理くない？
subtitles.english: But isn't doing it all impossible?

subtitles.original: いや、できる！やってみなきゃ始まらない！
subtitles.english: No, we can! It won't start if we don't try!
No way... you're planning to do everything?

subtitles.original: もちろん！どれか一つなんてもったいないでしょ！
subtitles.english: Of course! Picking just one would be such a waste!

subtitles.original: 全部やって良いのがあるか考えよう！
subtitles.english: Let's do them all and see what works!

subtitles.original: ちょっとは休憩入れさせてね...
subtitles.english: At least let us take a little break...

subtitles.original: だったらさ！各自自分の部屋でやりたい曲をやっていこう！
subtitles.english: In that case, let's each perform the songs we want in our own rooms!

subtitles.original: じゃあまずはねねねからね！
subtitles.english: Okay, starting with Nenene!

subtitles.original: この曲は...ねねは違う服でやる！
subtitles.english: For this song... Nene will change into different clothes!
Alright, let's do it.

subtitles.original: 今度こそ...これで出し物を決めるぞ～！
subtitles.english: This time for sure... this will decide our performance!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、やりますか！ねね、着替え終わった？
subtitles.english: Alright, shall we start? Nene, finished changing?

subtitles.original: オッケー！それじゃ、行きまーす！！
subtitles.english: Okay! Well then, here I go!!

subtitles.original: もう忘れてしまったかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I’ve already forgotten

subtitles.original: 夏の木陰に座ったまま
subtitles.english: Sitting in the shade of a summer tree

subtitles.original: 氷菓を口に放り込んで
subtitles.english: Throwing an ice candy into my mouth
Waiting for the wind to blow

subtitles.original: もう忘れてしまったかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I’ve already forgotten

subtitles.original: 世の中の全部嘘だらけ
subtitles.english: The whole world is just a pack of lies
That we’d go find the true value

subtitles.original: 探しに行こうと笑ったこと
subtitles.english: Together, and laughed
So I don’t forget
So it doesn’t fade
So it isn’t just about things
That leave a shape
Teach me more words
Tell me that summer is coming
I am drawing it

subtitles.original: 眼に映ったのは夏の亡霊だ
subtitles.english: A ghost of summer reflected in my eyes

subtitles.original: 風にスカートが揺れて
subtitles.english: A skirt sways in the wind
Forgetting all about memories
Taking shallow breaths
Wiping away sweat, it feels like summer

subtitles.original: もう忘れてしまったかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I’ve already forgotten
Back when I sat in the shade of a summer tree

subtitles.original: 遠くの丘から顔出した雲があったじゃないか
subtitles.english: There was a cloud poking out from the hill, wasn't there?

subtitles.original: 君はそれを掴もうとして
subtitles.english: You tried to grab it

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたいに空を切った手で
subtitles.english: With your hand cutting through the air like a fool

subtitles.original: 僕は紙に雲一つを書いて
subtitles.english: I drew a single cloud on a piece of paper
And laughed, grabbing it to show you
So I don’t forget
So it doesn’t fade
Because it isn’t about things
That remain in history
For now, even losing my face
Forgetting even all the words
You are laughing

subtitles.original: 夏を待っている僕ら亡霊だ
subtitles.english: We are ghosts waiting for summer
Teach me more of your heart
Teach me the scent of summer
Taking shallow breaths
So I don’t forget
So it doesn’t fade
Because it isn’t about things
That resonate in the heart
Teach me more words

subtitles.original: さよならだって教えて
subtitles.english: Teach me even about goodbye
I’m still seeing it now

subtitles.original: 夏に咲いている花に亡霊を
subtitles.english: A ghost in the flower that blooms in summer

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃなくて時間を
subtitles.english: It’s not about words, it’s about time
It’s not about time, it’s about the heart
Taking shallow breaths
Wiping away sweat, it feels like summer
It smells like summer
It smells like summer

subtitles.original: もう忘れてしまったかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I’ve already forgotten

subtitles.original: 夏の木陰に座ったまま
subtitles.english: Sitting in the shade of a summer tree
